name: Task-Conditioned Synthetic Data Generation for Improving Machine Learning Performance in Agricultural Prediction Tasks

description: arXiv:2607.09751v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Machine Learning (ML) algorithms have been widely used to estimate agricultural variables across diverse contexts. However, because the quantity and quality of training data strongly influence performance of ML algorithms, their use can be constrained by limited or incomplete reference data. Synthetic Data Generation (SDG) offers a practical appro...
author: Hamid Ebrahimy, Moritz Lucas, Martin Atzmueller
